flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Central Alabama Community College rose 114% between 2007 and 2010 (8.8% → 18.7%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Central Alabama Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Central Alabama Community College rose 28% between 2021 and 2024 (940 → 1.2k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Central Alabama Community College fell 22% between 2017 and 2020 ($12.4k → $9.8k).
